stream_required: B.E / B.Tech (CSE, IT or related fields)
eligibility: • No restrictions in terms of percentage or CGPA.
• The candidate should have a strong understanding of data structures and
• Prior experience with coding languages such as React, Node, or JavaScript
job_location: Mode of Internship: This will be a remote internship, providing flexibility for students to work from home. Joining location after internship will be intimated by HR later

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : INR 25,000 per month Salary after 6 months Internship (on confirmation) : CTC between 6 - 10 LPA
package_salary.bond: No. But we are looking students to not leave in between unless performance is an issue.

selection_process_steps: 1. First Round - Consists of two stages: 20-minute AI voice
a 15-minute coding round on our AI interview.
Minimum Intel i5 (8th Gen) or equivalent
2. Internet: Stable broadband with at least 80 Mbps download
